text.title: Accessibility Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from rendered screen to a11y-report verdict.

step.name: snapshot
step.action: Capture DOM snapshot + computed styles + viewport size; record URL + screen_id.

step.name: semantic-audit
step.action: Count landmarks (`header`/`main`/`nav`/`footer`/`aside`); count `<div onclick>` instances; verify heading hierarchy is monotonic.

step.name: aria-audit
step.action: For each ARIA attribute, ask "is there a native HTML element that already provides this semantic?" If yes, mark redundant.

step.name: keyboard-trace
step.action: Drive Tab key through all interactive elements; record reachable count, focus-visible boolean per element, traps (any modal/menu that fails to escape).

step.name: contrast-and-axe
step.action: Compute contrast ratio for every text foreground/background pair (use WCAG luminance formula); run axe-core CLI; aggregate violations by severity. Emit final verdict.
